column1: Hey candela, thanks for your interest in traveling with Go Blue Tours. Your personal trip rep, Spiffy, will text shortly with info and details
What's good! It's Spiffy from Go Blue here
Which week is your spring break? I'll send over the options and deets
What's gooodddyyy spiffy. My ideal dates are from the 13-18 or the 14-18 and I'm interested at staying at the occidental in Punta Cana thank ya
yoo my bad i missed this! but i got you punta cana is lit! thats where i'll be staying this year lol lets turn up
how many ppl in your group so far?
yessss we outside, so far there's only 2 people just me and my friend bc our other friends already booked before we confirmed were going
Ahh aight cool. where did your friend book?
Worddddd thats where i'll be too
let get y'all on! which school you from?
yessss it's gonna be lit there, we're from UConn hbu
I went Salve! in Newport RI not sure if you've been there
Uconn def knows how to party tho y'all are a good time lol
gonna put this info together for you rn, how soon were you lookin to get things booked?
I've never been but heard about it before, but I'm looking to get booked ASAP
yea lets do it. I'll hook it up with a deal and add the payment plan to it. helps spread things up a little into a few weeks
is it cool if I send most of the info through email? its a little long for text
yeah yk college student bills can get crazy so I greatly appreciate it 😛, my email is candelaluna1109@gmail.com
will send in a few mins
yoo just sent that over lmk if you got it
added a free booze cruise deal in there for y'all
Hey is there anyway you can do lower for a group of 2?
lemme see what I can do!
Ok thanks any better deal on either package is fine thanks so much
which do we wanna do between the 4 night and the 5 night
679 for 2 for the 4 night deal correct?
Sounds good! Can you send the link for that one?
yeaa I'd have to make the final reservation tho and send over. were y'all ready to lock it in
Im pretty sure we are set to lock in, thank you so much
okay bet yea I'll make that right now
Alr thank you so much I really appreciate it
Hey I still haven't received the email, sorry lol
ahh damn my b! lemme see whats up
mind checking your 'All Mail' tab. sometimes gmail filters things there
Checked all mail and nothing was sent. Should I give you another email just incase?
Yea you can send another, I'll try again. but thats weird its the same email I sent to the first time lol
sorry about that, just sent to the correct email
Its ok don't worry lol I forgot to put the 11 silly old me
Not sure who got the other email but someone def just got a random email from me lol
Its okay not a lot of candelas out there so ill prolly be fineeeee
yoo Candela whats good! we locking in the reservation?
Yeah we're gonna for sure do it tn we were just trying to find a good flight
okay bet. I can help you find a good one. where we flying out of?
We found one but we're just stuck since we would get there at 11pm on the 13th and the ones on the 14th are like insanely expensive
heres the cheapest I found for 14-18 https://www.google.com/travel/flights/s/hPr78Zf4PUhRU4uv8
Yeah the 14-18 is preferable but those prices are crazy
But we found a reasonable price for those dates just waiting for my other friend to confirm so we can purchase the tickets
lmk if y'all need anything. will keep the reservation active through the day
Yeah thanks so much we should be booking it by the end of the night
hey hey, checkin in were y'all able to get onto the reservation
hey I'm sorry spiffy for such delay I was just waiting on the other person to confirm they're going but we should be 1000 buying the tickets tonight
Hey spiffy I'm just about to go ahead and confirm this reservation is there anyway we can add the booze cruise package ?
Yea I got you. everyone wants it added on?
Yeah just me and the other person her name is naylenise
its $79. open bar, party cruise type vibe
Can we book it when we get there or it has to be added on now?
you got time to add it in online. up to 2 days before the trip
and then when you get there you can too but not sure what will be available on site and how much itll be
Hey can I give you the other person in my reservations number she has questions regarding the payment plan
yea just have her text me
Hey spiffy, I just did the first balance so we're all set 😊
Aight dope! Naylenise texted me too. lookin forward to havin y'all out there
hey hey, can we get your balance squared away for the trip. wanna get you and Naylenise all situated
Yes i will pay it now
bet! if you have your flight info ready, you can add it in on your account too so that we can schedule your airport transportation with us
Oh ok thanks didn't know that
perfect yea you'll see a flight info tab when you log in
our team will be there ready for you when you land
Hey is there anyway I can pay 200 today and the rest next friday since that's when I get paid
yo! we need you to add your flight info asap so we can schedule your transportation when you land
hey hey safe travels today. see y'all out here soon
